methods.name: CreateG2ChordalQuinticFilletSrf
methods.signature: public static bool CreateG2ChordalQuinticFilletSrf(BrepFace faceA, Point2d uvA, BrepFace faceB, Point2d uvB, double radius, double tolerance, List<Brep> trimmedBrepsA, List<Brep> trimmedBrepsB, int rail_degree, bool bTrim, bool bExtend, List<Brep> Fillets)
methods.summary: Creates a surface fillet using G2 chordal Quintic arc approximations as sections

params.name: faceA
params.doc: the first face to use constructing the fillet

params.name: uvA
params.doc: The parametric u,v selection point on FaceA close to the edge to fillet

params.name: faceB
params.doc: the second face to use constructing the fillet

params.name: uvB
params.doc: The parametric u,v selection point on FaceB close to the edge to fillet

params.name: radius
params.doc: The radius of the fillet

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: Tolerance to use in fitting a solution

params.name: trimmedBrepsA
params.doc: if bTrim = true, returns the remains of FaceA trimmed to the fillet

params.name: trimmedBrepsB
params.doc: if bTrim = true, the remains of FaceB trimmed to the fillet

params.name: rail_degree
params.doc: the degree of the rail curve

params.name: bTrim
params.doc: if True, trim the faces and retuen those results in resultsA and resultsB

params.name: bExtend
params.doc: if True and if one input surface is longer than the other, the fillet surface is extended to the input surface edges

params.name: Fillets
params.doc: the resulting fillet surfaces

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.signature: public void Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.signature: protected virtual void Dispose(bool disposing)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.signature: protected override void Finalize()
methods.summary: (Overrides Object.Finalize().)

methods.name: G2ChordalQuintic
methods.signature: public bool G2ChordalQuintic(int railDegree, bool bExtend, List<Brep> Fillets)
methods.summary: make fillet surfaces and hack them up to active pieces. Adjusts cross sections

params.name: railDegree
params.doc: The degree of the rail

params.name: bExtend
params.doc: If true, when one input surface is longer than the other, the fillet surface is extended to the input surface edges.

params.name: Fillets
params.doc: the fillet8s that were created

methods.name: IsInitialized
methods.signature: public bool IsInitialized()
methods.summary: Check to see if the fillet is properly initialized. If it is not, then the selected curves, surfaces, and/or radius must be adjusted in some way before creating the fillet

methods.name: NonRationalCubic
methods.signature: public bool NonRationalCubic(int railDegree, double TanSlider, bool bExtend, List<Brep> Fillets)
methods.summary: make fillet surfaces and hack them up to active pieces. Adjusts cross sections

params.name: railDegree
params.doc: The degree of the rail

params.name: TanSlider
params.doc: A number from -1 to 1 indicating how far towards the theoretical rational midpoint to adjust the tangent control points.

params.name: bExtend
params.doc: If true, when one input surface is longer than the other, the fillet surface is extended to the input surface edges.

params.name: Fillets
params.doc: the fillet8s that were created

methods.name: TrimBreps
methods.signature: public bool TrimBreps(bool bExtend, List<Brep> TrimmedBreps0, List<Brep> TrimmedBreps1)
methods.summary: If the two input breps are the same, TrimmedBreps[1] will be empty. The constructor idoes everything necessary for this to be called. Calles to the various fillet creation members will not change the result.
